city_tier_adjustments.explanation: Rates are first set for Tier I (X) cities; Tier II/III rates are derived as percentage reductions from Tier I.

tier_2_Y.note: 10% lower than Tier I rates. Also applies to North-East states, J&K, Ladakh.

examples: Most other Indian cities and towns

city_tier_adjustments.applies_to: Package rates / procedure rates only. Does NOT apply to consultations, lab investigations, day-care procedures, or minor procedures.

accreditation_adjustments.explanation: The CGHS rate sheet provides three columns per procedure: Non-NABH, NABH, Super Speciality. Pick the column matching the hospital's accreditation status.

non_nabh.note: Non-accredited hospitals get 15% lower than NABH rates.

super_speciality.note: Super-speciality hospitals get 15% higher than NABH rates. Speciality must be one of: Cardiology, CTVS, Neurology, Neurosurgery, Oncology, Urology/Nephrology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology, Plastic Surgery, Pulmonology, Rheumatology, Hand & Microsurgery.

ward_adjustments.explanation: The CGHS package rate is the semi-private ward rate. Adjust for actual ward used.

general_ward.note: General ward = 5% less than semi-private rate.

semi_private.note: Base rate as in CGHS table.

private_ward.note: Private ward = 5% more than semi-private rate.

ward_adjustments.applies_to: Inpatient procedures and surgeries only. Does NOT apply to consultations, day-care, or lab investigations (these are ward-uniform per CGHS rule).

multi_procedure_rule.explanation: Critical anomaly check. Hospitals routinely violate this rule.
multi_procedure_rule.rule: When multiple surgeries are performed in the same OT session on the same date:
multi_procedure_rule.applies_when: Surgeries are performed on same date, same operating theatre session, same anaesthesia event.
multi_procedure_rule.does_not_apply_when: Surgeries are on different dates or unrelated sessions even if same admission.
multi_procedure_rule.violation_pattern: Bill shows 2+ surgical procedures each at 100% of package rate.

room_rent_daily_caps.explanation: Maximum daily room rent. Hospital cannot charge above these regardless of accreditation, in CGHS empanelled mode.
room_rent_daily_caps.notes: These caps include nursing charges, basic monitoring, and standard ward services. Separate consumables/medication charges are over and above.

uniform_rate_categories.explanation: These categories have the same rate regardless of ward, city tier, or accreditation:
uniform_rate_categories.consultations: Same rate for all wards within same accreditation/tier.
uniform_rate_categories.tier_2_3_adjustments_for_these: Still apply (-10% for Tier II, -20% for Tier III). Only ward/accreditation adjustments are waived.

cancer_treatment_exception.rule: Cancer surgeries are excluded from this rate revision; existing CGHS rules apply to cancer surgeries.
